description: Bean Validation API defines the standard Java annotations and interfaces for declaring and inspecting constraints on objects, properties, method parameters, return values, and container elements. It provides the JSR 380 contracts that validation providers implement so applications can use a portable validation model without depending on a specific provider.

Bean Validation API defines the standard Java annotations and interfaces for declaring and inspecting constraints on objects, properties, method parameters, and return values. It provides the JSR 349 contracts that validation providers implement so applications can use a portable validation model without depending on a specific provider.

Bean Validation API defines the standard Java annotations and interfaces for declaring and inspecting constraints on objects, properties, method parameters, and return values. It provides the JSR 303 contracts that validation providers implement so applications can use a portable validation model without depending on a specific provider.
